calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-22-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-03-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendants Larry V. Boggus or Laura C. Boggus.
Amended Defaults entered against defendants on March 24, 2008.
Doe defendants dismissed on March 19, 2008.
Order waiving witness appearing at Default Prove-Up hearing was filed on April 25, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendants: Larry V. Boggus and Laura C. Boggus as follows:

Damages/Principal - $133,896.59.
Prejudgment Interest - $3,081.12.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $445.00, for a total of $139,922.71.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-14-2008 Continued To Aug-01-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-27-2008 Off Calendar
